title: resumeConversation should re-acquire wake lock
body: After pauseConversation releases the wake lock, calling resumeConversation does not re-acquire it. The user is resuming the voice conversation, so the screen should be kept on again. Add `await acquireWakeLock()` to resumeConversation in useVoiceChat.ts.
rationale: Users who pause then resume a voice conversation may find the screen dims again, disrupting the experience.

title: interruptConversation does not re-acquire wake lock
body: interruptConversation releases the wake lock (correct per issue scope) but does not re-acquire it. Since the conversation continues after an interrupt, the screen may dim mid-conversation. Consider re-acquiring after the interrupt flow stabilizes.
rationale: Users who interrupt AI speech to speak themselves may lose wake lock protection despite being in an active conversation.
